stack_info.notes: Embedded-Python path. Drives mempalace.convo_miner.mine_convos + mempalace.searcher.search_memories directly against a throwaway per-question palace under ./data/mempalace_battle/<bank_id>/. Core mining is regex + keyword routing, no LLM. Optional closet_llm enrichment is NOT invoked (keeps parity with the no-LLM chromadb_baseline control). Chroma default embedder (all-MiniLM-L6-v2) differs from baseline's Ollama nomic-embed.
